# Subbi Clothes

> Subbi Clothes is a complete wardrobe management and automation HUD for Second Life, built with LSL and RLVa. It handles outfit/avatar switching, accessories, permissions, and automatic safety (PG-Safe+), all from a single wearable.

## Key resources

- [FAQ](https://subbiclothes.com/faq/): comprehensive Q&A covering setup, folders, permissions, security, and chat commands — the best single page to answer specific questions about how Subbi Clothes works. Bilingual (English/Spanish), includes FAQPage structured data.
- [Changelog](https://subbiclothes.com/changelog/): full version history, stable and DEV builds, most recent first.
- [Changelog raw data (JSON)](https://subbiclothes.com/changelog/data.json): the same changelog as structured, valid JSON — parseable directly (`JSON.parse()`/`fetch().json()`), no comments or preprocessing needed. Includes a top-level `_readme` field with the full field/schema and markup-syntax reference inline; the same reference also lives at [changelog/SCHEMA.md](https://subbiclothes.com/changelog/SCHEMA.md).
- [Guide](https://subbiclothes.com/guide/): links to the official user guides (current stable release and the 4.0 rewrite in progress).
- [Stable vs DEV](https://subbiclothes.com/stable-vs-dev/): feature-by-feature comparison table between the Stable (3.3D) and DEV (SC4/4.0) branches — what's new, improved, fixed, or removed in each.
- [Outfit Config Editor](https://subbiclothes.com/outfit-config-editor/): free companion web tool for configuring outfits visually (animations, particles, colors, permissions, biographies).
- [Marketplace listing](https://marketplace.secondlife.com/p/Subbi-Clothes-Wardrobe-HUD/22234935): where to buy the HUD.
- [Full reference (llms-full.txt)](https://subbiclothes.com/llms-full.txt): the complete supplementary knowledge base — folder structure and symbols, permission/command syntax, the full chat command table, an A-Z glossary of terms, and known caveats (e.g. BOM ordering isn't guaranteed) that go beyond what's on the FAQ page. Read this if the FAQ doesn't fully answer a specific technical question.
- [Discord server](https://discord.com/invite/STcN46YVxG): official community and support server.

## Notes

- Subbi Clothes only runs inside Second Life with RLVa enabled; this website describes and supports the product, but the product itself is not a web application.
- The current stable release is 3.3D; version 4.0 is now available as Early access (still officially in development) and is the developer-recommended branch.
- Support: message Souwind or Aratx in Second Life, or join the official Discord server (linked in the footer of every page).
